description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentions people such as Ibrāhīm al-Ṣayrafī and the brother-in-law of Abū l-Manṣūr. Mentions the jāliya, blanket/cloak (malḥafa), natron, bread, and various other items.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
